description_long: This is a rectangular wooden drawer with a dark brown wood grain finish, featuring a single metallic handle on one side. The handle is rectangular and appears to be made of brass or a similar metal, providing a subtle contrast to the wood. The interior is spacious and unadorned, matching the exterior's wood texture. The drawer has clean, straight edges and a modern, minimalist design, suitable for contemporary urban furniture. The sides and back are solid wood panels, while the front panel is distinguished by the handle. This drawer would typically be found as part of a larger furniture piece such as a dresser, cabinet, or storage unit in an urban environment.
description: A dark brown wooden drawer with a brass-colored rectangular handle and a minimalist, modern design. The drawer is spacious and features a consistent wood grain texture throughout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic handle centered on the wooden face.
description_view_1: Side view with no handle visible, displaying the continuous wood grain panel.
description_view_2: Back view, identical to the side, with no handle or distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also without a handle, showing the wood grain texture.
